description_long: This structure is a large, wooden half-pipe ramp with a flat deck on top, surrounded by metal railings for safety. The sides of the ramp feature colorful graffiti art, adding an urban and artistic touch to the otherwise utilitarian design. One end of the ramp has a tall, vertical extension with a staircase leading up to the deck, providing access to the upper platform. The main body of the ramp is constructed from light-colored wood panels, with a smooth, continuous curve suitable for skateboarding or similar activities. The base is solid and boxy, with an open rectangular cutout in the center, possibly for passage or structural reasons. The overall appearance is robust and functional, with clear attention to both safety and aesthetics.
description: A large wooden half-pipe ramp with metal railings, graffiti art, and a staircase leading to an upper deck. The structure is robust, with a smooth curved surface and a central cutout at the base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the staircase, upper deck, and a large graffiti mural on the ramp's vertical face.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the interior curve of the ramp, graffiti on both sides, and the open deck area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the ramp, the central cutout at the base, and the top deck with railings.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view focusing on the other side's graffiti, the smooth ramp surface, and the staircase structure.
